raw_text:
- 9 - L.A.C. No.:83/2022
PW-1:
Witness present and duly sworn on 11/01/2024.
Examination-in-chief by advocate for claimant.
I have filed affidavit as my examination -in-chief . I know the
contents of the affidavit. It is prepared at my instructions. The
contents of the affidavit are true and correct. The affidavit bears my
signatures.
I am producing following documents.
Ex. P. 1 GPA dated 22.09.2023 executed by the claimant in my favour.
Ex. P. 2 Certified copy of Grant Certificate.
Ex. P. 3 Certified copy of Patta Book.
Ex. P. 4 Certified copy of tax paid receipt.
Ex. P. 5 Certified copy of Registered Partition Deed dated 29.06.1974.
Ex. P. 6 Certified copy of Registered Sale Deed dated 12.11.2009.
Ex. P. 7 Certified copy of JDA dated 31.01.2011.
Ex. P. 8 Certified copies of 10 RTC's pertaining to Survey No. 87/2 of
Kothnur Village.
Ex. P. 9 Certified copy of the Report of Deputy Tahsildar dated
30.05.2005.
Ex. P. 10 Certified copy of the Conversion Order dated 05.11.2005
along with conversion sketch.
Ex. P. 11 Certified copy of Layout Plan has approved by BDA.
Ex. P. 12 Certified copy of order in W.P.31892/2009 (LA- BDA)
connected with other writ petitions and a RFA DD on
09.10.2012.
Learned Advocate for petitioner and Learned advocate
for pray for time. Hence cross examination of P.W. 1
deferred. s
(Typed to my dictation in open court, as the deposition
is proceeded with).
R.O.I. & A.C.
C/c II Addl. City Civil & Sessions
Judge, and Spl. Judge,
Bangalore City.

final_output:
## Document Type: Affidavit

### Overview:
This affidavit attests the authenticity of an affidavit submitted by the claimant, accompanied by various supporting documents. The document is filed under the City Civil & Sessions Judge and Special Judge, Bangalore City.

### Main Content:
I have produced the following supporting documents in this affidavit:

1. GPA dated September 22, 2023, granted in favor of the claimant.
2. Certified copy of a Grant Certificate.
3. Certified copy of the Patta Book.
4. Certified copy of tax payment receipt.
5. Part registered sale deed dated November 12, 2009.
6. Joint Development Agreement dated January 31, 2011.
7. Eight certified copies of RTC pertaining to Survey No. 87/2 in Kothnur village.
8. Deputy Tahsildar's report dated May 30, 2005.
9. Order and Conversion Sketch related to conversion order dated November 5, 2005.
10. Layout Plan approved by BDA.
11. RFA (Reasonable Forbearance Agreement) DD on October 9, 2012, associated with other writ petitions and a related matter.

The document is submitted under Case Nos. C/IADCS & Spl.Judg-II (City Civil & Sessions Judge and Special Judge), Bangalore City.

### Key Takeaways:
- Various supporting documents have been attached to this affidavit.
- The documents pertain to the case filed in Court No. C/IADCS & Spl.Judg-II, Bangalore City.
- This document includes an RFA related to other writ petitions and a related matter.

### Flags:
- None

This is a clean and non-repetitive structure of the provided text.

terms.meaning: The initial questioning of a witness by the party who called them to testify
A written statement made under oath, used as evidence in court
A copy that has been verified and certified by a recognized authority
Records of Transfer Certificate, related to land transfers
A type of legal action brought in the High Court or Supreme Court
Request for Directions Document issued by a court
A detailed plan showing the arrangement and layout of buildings on a piece of land
Bangalore Development Authority, an organization responsible for urban development in Bangalore
